description: Places where time itself has broken, folding past and future into a present that cannot be trusted.
biomes: Rippling waves of distortion roll across the land, aging stone to dust in one moment and sprouting new growth the next.
A pocket where time runs at the wrong speed. Hours pass in heartbeats, or a single step takes a day to complete.
Ghostly images of what once stood here flicker in and out of view. Buildings rise and fall, and old voices carry on the wind.
The landscape shifts between what is and what will be. Strange structures appear and vanish, and the sky shows stars not yet born.
A visible tear in the air through which different eras bleed together. The edges crackle and the light bends strangely.
Everything caught mid-motion. Rain hangs in the air, birds are fixed in flight, and the silence is the silence of stopped time.
Plants sprout, bloom, fruit, and die in minutes. The forest floor churns with constant renewal and the air smells of green and rot at once.
